All segments 4-23 are SPEAKER_00/coach commentary. Speaker collapse flag likely false positive—single speaker throughout. Text reads coherently as coach narrating bad approach demos.
Continuous coach monologue. No second speaker evident in context. Speaker_collapsed flag appears erroneous—coach is quoting himself doing bad demos, not a real dialogue partner.
Coach quoting example compliments inline. No speaker change detectable. Text coherent as commentary with embedded demo quotes.
Continuation of coach explaining bad compliment examples. Single speaker throughout. Speaker ambiguity flag likely triggered by quoted speech within monologue.
Coach demos a weak opener then narrates result. Embedded quoted speech ('hey excuse me') may have triggered collapse detection. Single speaker confirmed by consistent style.
Coach narrating the girl's non-verbal reaction to his demo. No actual second speaker. Text coherent as single-speaker commentary.
Coach analyzing why weak delivery fails. Continuous monologue. Speaker label correct—no interlocutor present in this teaching segment.
Short segment continues coach's analysis. Flows naturally into seg 16-17 listing what weak delivery communicates. Single speaker confirmed.
Coach quoting imagined woman's thoughts in commentary. Speaker label correct—continuous SPEAKER_00 narration. Quoted speech triggers false ambiguity.
Continuation of coach voicing woman's perceived thoughts. Same speaker throughout. Speaker collapse flag is false positive—no actual second speaker.
Coach narrating next attempt prediction. Still commentary by SPEAKER_00. Content sounds like inner monologue but speaker is consistent with surrounding segs.
Coach quoting his own weak opener 'Nice outfit, guys.' Could be live approach audio but seg 20 confirms commentary mode. Slightly lower confidence due to ambiguity.
Coach analyzing lack of response. Clear commentary language ('They didn't even respond'). Speaker and phase labels correct.
Self-critique about low volume. Unambiguous coach commentary. Speaker collapse flag is false positive here.
Meta-reference to camera confirms coach commentary. Speaker label clearly correct. No ambiguity.
Coach summarizing reactions. Continuous with surrounding commentary. Speaker and phase correct. No repair needed.
Continuous coach monologue commentary. Speaker label consistent with surrounding segments. Text is coherent and flows naturally from seg 23.
Continuation of same coach commentary thought from seg 24. Speaker consistent. Text grammatically sound.
Completes the sentence started in seg 25. Same speaker, same commentary phase. No ambiguity evident.
Coach continues explaining delivery vs words. Coherent with prior segments. Slight overlap timing with seg 28 but same speaker.
